generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that investing in civil defense preparedness actually strengthens our national security while protecting our liberties? By ensuring communities are ready for emergencies, we reduce the need for heavy-handed government interventions. This balanced approach keeps us safe without compromising our values. #PreparednessMatters #SecurityAndFreedom
